title: Currency Ultimate
description: A mod for your server making sure that you can have a healthy and stable economy this mod adds money and ores
body: This mod is made for servers or LAN and is nice if you want to make an economy. and adds a 1 Pound or gold coin, a 5 pound or gold Note and a 10 pound or gold note. It also adds an ore called silver that is used to make the money.
